items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Postage class selection' feature, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga without addressing postage class selection, indicating a lack of coverage for this requirement.
